overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay showing a character in a green jacket exploring a dark, decaying abandoned hospital or institutional building. The character uses a flashlight to navigate through debris-filled hallways, descends concrete stairwells, and investigates rooms with medical equipment. The atmosphere is tense with damaged ceilings, blood stains, and flickering artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: decayed room with barred window transitioning to corridor

events.description: character exits initial room through wooden doorway into debris-filled hallway

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through a dark room with a flashlight, examining the barred window and radiator before moving through the doorway

entered.detail: window with metal bars and white radiator below, illuminated by flashlight
dark wooden door frame leading to hallway
scattered rubble and trash on the concrete floor
dark red stain on the floor near the doorway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a small decayed room with a barred window and radiator. The character, holding a flashlight, walks toward a wooden door frame and exits into a debris-filled hallway, revealing blood stains and scattered rubble on the concrete floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled institutional hallway with damaged ceiling

events.description: ceiling damage becomes more severe with exposed pipes and collapsed tiles visible overhead

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the corridor, flashlight sweeping across damaged walls and ceiling debris

entered.detail: collapsed ceiling panels with exposed wiring and pipes hanging down
flickering overhead light in the corridor ceiling
small windows along the left wall with metal grates

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow institutional hallway with significant structural damage. Overhead, ceiling tiles are collapsed exposing pipes and wiring, while fluorescent lights flicker intermittently. The floor is littered with debris and blood stains as the character progresses deeper into the corridor.

events.description: character begins descending the stairwell from upper floor to lower level

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down concrete stairs, hand on the railing, flashlight illuminating the steps below

entered.detail: concrete staircase descending to lower floor with worn steps
wooden and metal handrail along the right side of stairs
small wall-mounted light illuminating the stairwell landing

segments.scene_description: The character enters a concrete stairwell and begins descending to a lower floor. The flashlight reveals worn concrete steps and a wooden handrail. Wall-mounted fixtures provide dim illumination as the character navigates the descent, with graffiti visible on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with checkered flooring and institutional signage

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the lower floor hallway, passing institutional signs and fire safety equipment

entered.detail: red and white checkered tile pattern covering the corridor floor
red wall-mounted fire safety cabinet with glass front
blue sign with white text indicating M3 room designation
chain-link fence gate blocking a side corridor

segments.scene_description: Having reached the lower floor, the character walks along a long corridor with distinctive red and white checkered flooring. The walls feature institutional signage including a blue M3 door sign and a red fire extinguisher cabinet. A metal gate blocks a side passage as the character continues down the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned patient room with hospital bed

events.description: character enters a small room containing a hospital bed and medical equipment

agents.ego_description: entering the room and slowly looking around, examining the hospital bed, barred window, and wall fixtures with the flashlight

entered.detail: metal frame hospital bed with stained sheets and mattress
large window with metal bars and torn curtains
framed picture hanging on the wall above the bed
dirty torn fabric curtain hanging beside the window
wall-mounted sink with medical counter and supplies

segments.scene_description: The character enters an abandoned patient room containing a metal hospital bed with stained linens. The flashlight reveals a barred window with torn curtains, a framed picture on the wall, and a sink counter. The character explores the space, panning the light across the walls and ceiling damage before turning back toward the door.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway leading to reception area with arched window

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and enters a reception room with an arched window

agents.ego_description: walking down the hallway, approaching and opening a large wooden door to reveal a reception area with a desk and arched window

entered.detail: heavy dark wooden double doors with metal handles
long wooden reception counter with papers and office items
large arched window with multiple panes behind the reception desk
pendant lights hanging from the ceiling illuminating the reception area

segments.scene_description: The character exits the hospital room and walks down the checkered hallway to a large wooden door. Upon opening it, the scene reveals a reception area with a long wooden desk, hanging ceiling lights, and a prominent arched window at the far end. The character enters this new space, approaching the reception counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic decayed room through a crumbling institutional interior and down into a sterile lower corridor. It begins in a small room with a barred window, moving through a wooden door frame into a debris-filled hallway marked by blood stains and scattered rubble. As the character progresses, the environment shifts into a narrow corridor where collapsed ceiling tiles expose wiring and flickering fluorescent lights cast an unstable glow over the wreckage. The scene then transitions into a concrete stairwell, descending past graffiti-covered walls and worn steps under dim illumination. Finally, the camera emerges onto a lower floor, moving along a long hallway characterized by red and white checkered flooring, institutional signage, and a metal gate blocking a side passage.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a patient room into a spacious, echoing reception area. It begins inside a decaying room, where a flashlight beam cuts through the dark to reveal a stained hospital bed, a barred window with torn curtains, and damaged ceilings. As the character turns away from the walls and exits the room, the perspective shifts to a checkered hallway leading toward a large wooden door. Upon opening the door, the scene expands into a wide reception hall featuring a long wooden desk and hanging lights, before the camera moves forward toward a prominent arched window at the far end of the space.
